project_type: TypeScript monorepo - quant-live real-time voice assistant package
test_framework: vitest with globals: true, tests in src/__tests__/*.test.ts
verification_instructions: Run vitest in the quant-live package and confirm all tests pass
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node.js v22.
contribution_requirements: <=500 LOC per PR. Commit message format: test(quant-live): add latency budget, memory stability, and cost tests
key_patterns: Tests use vitest describe/it/expect. Mocks use vi.fn(). Pipeline measures ASR/LLM/TTS latency per-segment. LatencyTracker uses startMeasure/endMeasure with string IDs. Types are in src/types.ts. Pipeline uses async generators for streaming. AudioBufferLog has a purge mechanism for memory management.
directory_structure: packages/quant-live/src/ has subdirs: core/ (pipeline, latency-tracker, session-manager), asr/, llm/, tts/, conversation/, capture/, grounding/, wake-word/, privacy/, persistence/, and __tests__/. Each module exports via src/index.ts.
